hero.title: We Build Systems That Scale
hero.subtitle: High-performance web platforms engineered for the world's most ambitious companies.

problem.title: Legacy Systems Are Slowing You Down
problem.old_desc: Clunky interfaces, disconnected databases, and frequent downtime causing frustration.
problem.new_desc: Unified architecture, instant response times, and an interface your team will love.

features.title: Built for Modern Workflows
features.subtitle: We use the best technologies of 2026 to deliver unmatched speed, reliability, and scale.

items.title: Zero-CLS Architecture
items.description: Sub-second load times with pixel-perfect stability.

items.title: Global Edge Delivery
items.description: Data served securely from the edge, closer to your users.

items.title: Scalable Infrastructure
items.description: Cloud-native architectures built to handle millions of requests.

items.title: Developer Experience
items.description: Built with modern primitives that your engineering team will love.

items.title: Real-time Sync
items.description: Sub-millisecond data synchronization across all clients via WebSockets.

items.title: Bank-Grade Security

step_details.title: 1. Architect
step_details.desc: We map out your data model and system topology using cloud-native paradigms.

step_details.title: 2. Build
step_details.desc: Iterative development with zero-downtime continuous integration.

step_details.title: 3. Scale
step_details.desc: Deploy to Edge networks with autoscaling infrastructure.

testimonials.title: What ambitious teams say about us

items.quote: Ionity transformed our legacy platform into a lightning-fast modern application. Our conversion rates doubled within a month of launch.
items.author: Sarah Jenkins

items.quote: The team's grasp of modern web architecture is unmatched. They don't just write code; they engineer business solutions that scale effortlessly.
items.author: Marcus Chen

items.quote: We needed a platform that could handle 10x our current volume without a sweat. Ionity delivered a system that is both beautiful and bulletproof.
items.author: Elena Rostova

cta.title: Ready to scale?
cta.subtitle: Join the companies building the future with Ionity.

about.title: We engineer high-performance systems for modern businesses.
about.description: Ionity is a premier software engineering startup. We specialize in building cloud-native SaaS platforms, real-time sync systems, and premium web architectures that help businesses scale securely and rapidly.
about.value1_desc: Deploying code closer to users to guarantee sub-50ms latencies and instant interaction.
about.value2_desc: Strict testing frameworks and TypeScript ensure your system remains stable as it scales.
about.value3_desc: Pixel-perfect interfaces tailored to your brand, ensuring stunning, conversion-focused user journeys.

pricing.title: Designed for Startups and Scale-ups
pricing.subtitle: Select a plan that suits your product development phase, from MVPs to high-scale enterprise platforms.
pricing.tier1_desc: For early-stage startups needing a functional prototype to raise capital.
pricing.tier2_desc: For established platforms looking to scale their infrastructure and UI.
pricing.tier3_desc: For companies requiring maximum SLA guarantees, custom cloud, and compliance.

contact.title: Let's build something exceptional together
contact.subtitle: Ready to scale your next digital product? Send us a message and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.placeholder_message: Tell us about your project, technology stack, and timeline...
contact.success_desc: Connecting you to our WhatsApp Business portal to send your details directly.
